chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 3096 of 2019 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ For orders as to maintainability of petition 14.01.2025 Mr. Inzimam Sharif, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Zubair Hashmi advocate holds brief for Mr. Pervaiz Ahmed Memon, advocate for respondent Ms. Sara Malkani, Assistant Attorney General Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that this petition assails a show cause notice, however, the petitioner would not press this petition and respond to the show cause notice before the issuing authority. It is further sought that pending adjudication to the show cause notice no further coercive action be taken against the petitioner. Learned counsel for respondent / department has no cavil in such regard. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
